source_catalog.name: SEC EDGAR submissions and Company Facts
source_catalog.cadence: Real time as filings are disseminated
source_catalog.typical_latency: Usually under one minute for XBRL; filing metadata typically under one second
limitations: As-filed data can contain issuer errors or amended facts
XBRL concepts and fiscal periods are not perfectly comparable across issuers

source_catalog.name: SEC Forms 3, 4 and 5
source_catalog.typical_latency: Most Form 4 transactions are due within two business days
source_catalog.intended_use: Insider ownership changes and open-market purchase or sale context
limitations: Transaction codes must distinguish purchases, sales, grants, exercises, gifts and tax withholding
A filing is not proof that an insider trade predicts future returns

source_catalog.name: SEC Form 13F data sets
source_catalog.typical_latency: Up to 45 days after quarter end
source_catalog.intended_use: Slow-moving institutional holdings, concentration and quarter-over-quarter changes
limitations: Not a real-time institutional flow signal
Does not reveal every asset, short position, hedge or intra-quarter trade
As-filed records can contain filer errors and confidential-treatment omissions

source_catalog.name: Issuer investor-relations releases
source_catalog.intended_use: Earnings releases, guidance, presentations and material company events cross-checked with EDGAR
limitations: Issuer materials are management communications and may emphasize favorable framing
Use SEC filings as the canonical record when disclosures differ

source_catalog.name: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis FRED and ALFRED
source_catalog.typical_latency: Series dependent; many observations are revised
source_catalog.intended_use: Rates, credit spreads, labor, inflation, liquidity and financial conditions
limitations: FRED combines many original publishers with different calendars
Use ALFRED vintages for backtests to avoid look-ahead from later revisions

source_catalog.name: U.S. Treasury daily yield curve
source_catalog.intended_use: Risk-free curve level, slope and rate-shock context
limitations: Par yields are model-derived curve points, not executable trade prices

source_catalog.name: Federal Reserve FOMC calendar, statements and projections
source_catalog.intended_use: Policy-event risk, rate decisions, minutes and Summary of Economic Projections
limitations: Projections are conditional participant forecasts with substantial uncertainty

source_catalog.name: Cboe VIX Index and methodology
source_catalog.intended_use: Option-implied S&P 500 volatility regime and tail-risk context
limitations: VIX is not a direct forecast of portfolio loss
Mean reversion and futures term structure matter for VIX-linked products

source_catalog.name: FINRA short-interest and short-sale-volume data
source_catalog.cadence: Daily short-sale volume; short interest twice monthly
source_catalog.intended_use: Short positioning background and off-exchange short-sale activity
limitations: Daily short-sale volume is not short interest
Daily files cover reported off-exchange activity and are not consolidated with all exchanges
Short-sale volume can include positions closed on the same day

source_catalog.name: CFTC Commitments of Traders
source_catalog.typical_latency: Usually Friday release for Tuesday positions
source_catalog.intended_use: Futures positioning in equity indexes, rates, energy, metals and currencies
limitations: Aggregated categories are not security-specific equity fund flows
The usual Tuesday-to-Friday delay limits short-horizon timing use

source_catalog.name: U.S. Energy Information Administration Open Data
source_catalog.cadence: Daily, weekly, monthly or annual by series
source_catalog.intended_use: Oil prices, inventories, production, imports, exports and refinery utilization
limitations: Weekly estimates can be revised and may not align with equity-market timestamps

source_catalog.name: U.S. Treasury OFAC, USTR and Federal Register
source_catalog.intended_use: Sanctions, tariffs and regulatory actions with direct company or sector exposure
limitations: Official actions do not capture every geopolitical development or market interpretation
Company exposure mapping requires verified issuer geography and supply-chain data

source_catalog.name: Yahoo Finance via yfinance
source_catalog.intended_use: Price, volume and deterministic trend or volatility features
limitations: Not an official exchange feed
Corporate-action adjustments and occasional missing observations require validation

warnings: Yahoo Finance 資料可能延遲，僅供研究；下單前必須向券商核對價格。
